title: Tiger Eye Rice Chain Bracelet — Gold-Tone Stone Bracelet
short_description: Glossy natural Tiger Eye beads meet a sleek gold-tone rice link chain in this bold, unisex bracelet — the stone of confidence, focus and courage, styled for every day.
body_html:
Add a bold yet elegant touch to your everyday style with the Tiger Eye Rice Chain Bracelet. Glossy natural Tiger Eye stone beads sit on a sleek gold-tone elongated rice link chain, creating a look that feels premium, modern and meaningful — perfect for daily wear or gifting.

Tiger Eye Energy
Tiger Eye is known for confidence, focus, courage, grounding and strong decision-making energy — a stone for people who move with intent.

Design Details

  • Natural Tiger Eye beads with a glossy, polished finish and rich golden-brown bands
  • Gold-tone rice link chain — elongated links for a stylish, polished look
  • Lobster clasp with extension chain for an adjustable, secure and comfortable fit
  • Unisex styling — designed for both men and women

Why You'll Love It

  • Stylish everyday bracelet with a premium half-stone, half-chain design
  • Pairs effortlessly with casual, office and festive outfits
  • Meaningful stone energy in a modern silhouette
  • Ideal for gifting — birthdays, festivals or a confidence boost for someone you love

Specifications

  • Net Quantity: 1 Bracelet
  • Suitable For: Men & Women
  • Main Stone: Tiger Eye
  • Chain Type: Gold-tone elongated rice link chain
  • Closure: Lobster clasp with extension chain
  • Fit: Adjustable
  • Finish: Glossy and polished
seo_title: Tiger Eye Rice Chain Bracelet | Gold-Tone Unisex
seo_description: Natural Tiger Eye bead bracelet with gold-tone rice link chain. Stone of confidence & focus. Adjustable unisex fit. Ships in 24 hrs, COD available.

metafields.highlights: Natural glossy Tiger Eye beads · Gold-tone rice link chain · Adjustable lobster clasp with extension chain · Unisex design for men & women · Stone of confidence, focus and courage
metafields.material_or_ingredients: Natural Tiger Eye stone beads with gold-tone alloy rice link chain and lobster clasp closure
metafields.care_or_directions: Keep away from water, perfume and sweat to protect the gold-tone finish. Wipe gently with a soft dry cloth after wear and store in a dry pouch.
metafields.shipping: Ships in 24 hrs · COD available · Free shipping over ₹499

faqs.q: Is this real Tiger Eye stone?
faqs.a: Yes. The bracelet is made with natural Tiger Eye beads, each with its own golden-brown banding — so no two pieces look exactly alike.

faqs.q: Can both men and women wear it?
faqs.a: Absolutely. It's a unisex design — the mix of stone beads and a slim gold-tone chain works equally well on men's and women's wrists.
Yes. It closes with a lobster clasp and an extension chain, so you can adjust the fit to your comfort.

faqs.q: What is Tiger Eye known for?
faqs.a: Tiger Eye is traditionally associated with confidence, focus, courage, grounding and clear decision-making — a popular everyday stone for people who want to stay sharp and steady.

faqs.q: How do I keep the gold-tone chain shiny?
faqs.a: Avoid water, perfume and sweat contact, wipe with a soft dry cloth after wearing, and store it in a dry pouch. With basic care the finish stays bright for a long time.

faqs.q: Is it a good gifting option?
faqs.a: Yes — it comes across as premium and meaningful, making it a great gift for birthdays, festivals or anyone starting something new.
